title: Cuneiform Tablet #0833: Old Assyrian Marriage Contract
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a marriage contract document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Assyrian period. Marriage Contract document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records marriage contract matters typical of Old Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
